title: selago farrago
intro: Selago farrago, also known as "canyon zauschneria," is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selago farrago include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to combat certain infections. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and stems have been used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
